rules: When told to update @docs/, @AGENTS.md, or @README.md: apply best-practice documentation rules. Verify every referenced function, file path, flag, and config key against the actual source code. Fix any docs-vs-code drift. Use consistent terminology. Keep it concise and accurate — no filler or unverifiable claims.

update docs.description: Update docs/ AGENTS.md README.md with best-practice audit
update docs.template: Update @docs/, @AGENTS.md, and @README.md with best-practice documentation rules. Verify every referenced function, file path, flag, and config key against the actual source code. Fix any docs-vs-code drift. Use consistent terminology. Keep it concise and accurate with no filler or unverifiable claims.
